After eliminating the terrorist, the Army recovered war-like stores, including an AK rifle, pistols, and a large quantity of ammunition.

articles.title: Election Dates Live: Election Dates For 5 States To Be Announced Today

dailyNews.title: Son of British couple detained in Iran 'let down' by Starmer's leadership on parent's imprisonment amid war
dailyNews.description: The son of British prisoners in Iran slammed U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's "non-existent" advocacy and urged President Donald Trump to remember prisoners during strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Potomac sewage cleanup complete after massive spill ahead of summer America250 celebrations
dailyNews.description: Potomac River sewage spill repairs have been completed after President Donald Trump approved a federal disaster declaration allowing FEMA assistance.

dailyNews.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
dailyNews.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Pardons: Lobbyist Charged in Extortion Attempt
dailyNews.description: Josh Nass had recently represented Joseph Schwartz, a former nursing home executive who was convicted of tax crimes before being freed by the president late last year.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

dailyNews.description: Right now it does matter a lot whether actors can find the right words.

dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.
